errors.message:
Item does not exist

GraphQL request:1:28
1 | mutation DI($uuid:String!){deleteItem(itemUuid:$uuid){ok}}
  |                            ^

note: DynamoDB returns errors (Item does not exist) for non-existent delete ? valid graceful handling, different from PostgreSQL (which returns ok=true)
